tasks.title: 听力理解
tasks.description: 仔细听短文，回答相关问题

content.passage: The deep ocean is a magical place. Sunlight cannot reach its deepest parts, yet life thrives there. Many creatures create their own light, like tiny stars in the dark water.
content.translation: 深海是一个神奇的地方。阳光无法到达它最深的区域，但生命在那里繁荣生长。许多生物能够自己发光，就像黑暗海水中的小星星。

questions.q: Why is the deep ocean dark?
What do deep sea creatures do?

tasks.title: 朗读练习
tasks.description: 大声朗读以下短文，练习发音和语感

content.text: The sun rises over the ocean. Waves gently touch the shore. A new day begins with endless possibilities. Every morning is a chance to learn something new and become better than yesterday.
content.translation: 太阳从海面升起。波浪轻轻拍打着海岸。新的一天充满了无限可能。每个早晨都是学习新东西、变得比昨天更好的机会。

tasks.title: 翻译练习
tasks.description: 将中文句子翻译成英语，锻炼表达能力

sentences.zh: 我想去海边看看美丽的珊瑚礁。
sentences.en: I want to go to the seaside to see the beautiful coral reefs.

sentences.zh: 保护海洋环境是我们每个人的责任。
sentences.en: Protecting the marine environment is everyone's responsibility.

sentences.zh: 海洋里生活着成千上万种奇妙的生物。
sentences.en: Thousands of wonderful creatures live in the ocean.

tasks.title: 今日复盘
